---
title: "Series Recordings"
---

Past offerings of this series have been recorded and are embedded below. Use the headings below to find the part of the series for which you want to view the recording then choose the relevant tab for which iteration of the recording (if more than one is available) is of interest.

## Designing and Facilitating Engaging and Effective Meetings

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2026-27 CoP

<div style="padding:56.25% 0 0 0;position:relative;"><iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/1190621665?badge=0&amp;autopause=0&amp;player_id=0&amp;app_id=58479" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="CoP Inclusive &amp; Effective Group Facilitation"></iframe></div><script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>

:::

## Facilitation Practices to Support Access, Inclusion, and Belonging

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2026-27 CoP

<div style="padding:62.53% 0 0 0;position:relative;"><iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/1199549970?badge=0&amp;autopause=0&amp;player_id=0&amp;app_id=58479" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="CoP_Effective and Inclusive Group Facilitation_Session 2_06.04.26"></iframe></div><script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>

:::

## Tools and Practices to Support Group Decision Making

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2026-27 CoP

<div style="padding:62.5% 0 0 0;position:relative;"><iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/1208568082?badge=0&amp;autopause=0&amp;player_id=0&amp;app_id=58479" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="CoP Series 1: Inclusive &amp; Effective Group Facilitation 2026-07-09 18:05:10"></iframe></div><script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>

:::
